business.name: Gizmos Painting
business.tagline: Paint that brings life back to Charlotte homes

hero.headline: *Two coats* and your place looks brand new
hero.subheadline: Met our guy Gizmo at Sherwin-Williams? Half of Charlotte has. The other half should.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Paint Jobs
services_section.subheading: From faded shutters to fresh bedrooms — we handle the prep, the paint, and the cleanup

services.title: Interior Room Painting
services.description: Bedrooms, living rooms, whole houses. We bring the paint, you pick the color. Two coats standard, cleanup included.

services.title: Exterior House Painting
services.description: Doors, shutters, siding that's lost its life. We'll bring it back with quality paint and proper prep work.

services.title: Touch-Up & Repair
services.description: Started a project yourself? Got injured halfway through? We'll finish what you started, no judgment.

about.heading: The Guy You Meet at Sherwin-Williams
about.body: Gizmo's been painting Charlotte homes for years. You'll probably run into him picking up supplies downtown. His crew shows up when they say they will, brings the paint, and gets it done right. Ask around — your neighbors already know us.

reviews.name: Joe T.
reviews.text: Met Gizmo randomly at Sherwin-Williams when our original painter backed out. Saved our move-in timeline.

reviews.name: Gina S.
reviews.text: Quick meeting, competitive quote on our two bedrooms. Would recommend to anyone in Charlotte.

reviews.name: Jeanette M.
reviews.text: I hurt my arm mid-project. They were here in 2 days, brought the paint, and knocked out two coats.

reviews.name: Nikol S.
reviews.text: Our faded door and shutters looked dead. They brought all the life back with SW Black Bean satin.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Charlotte
service_areas.subheading: Interior and exterior painting throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
cta.body: Competitive quotes, quick turnaround, paint included. Call Gizmo or send us your project details.
